title: evolvulus rotundifolius
intro: Evolvulus rotundifolius, also known as Brazilian dwarf morning glory or round-leaf dwarf morning glory, is a perennial plant species native to Brazil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Evolvulus rotundifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Evolvulus rotundifolius can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
